role: Rust library crate defining the JSON-over-stdio protocol between the meta CLI host and its subprocess plugins (PluginInfo discovery via --meta-plugin-info, PluginRequest/PlanResponse exec via --meta-plugin-exec). Also provides the run_plugin() entrypoint and logger init that every meta_*_cli plugin embeds.
northstar: Meta makes multi-repo feel like monorepo without the downsides; the canon machinery stays green, versioned by the parent distribution.
next_command: Plan in kb first (git kb board); mint execution cards via hf (ADR-0003)
